title: phyllanthus trinervius
intro: Phyllanthus trinervius, also known as the three-veined leaf-flower or three-veined Phyllanthus, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating liver and kidney problems, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus trinervius is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat skin conditions.
